object_a.label: lamp
object_a.description: white table lamp with fabric shade
object_a.long_form_open_description: Classic table lamp with a white/off-white tapered fabric shade and a base mostly obscured by nearby objects; positioned on the side table close to the stairs and couch.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: sits on the side table, between the couch and the potted plant

object_b.label: door
object_b.description: glass sliding/French style door with grid panes
object_b.long_form_open_description: A full-height glass door with a white muntin/grid pattern creating multiple small panes. The door sits in a white-painted frame and opens to the exterior; glass is clear with some glare from outside. Door threshold and lower trim visible at floor level.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: immediately right of the vertical blinds and left of the beige wall with picture frame
object_b.object_text_short: glass sliding/French style door with grid panes
